issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing extensions or unsupported features.
The instructions lack concrete runnable SQL code or scripts, making it harder to directly implement the guidance.

scenarios.name: Multi-tenant RLS schema for SaaS app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used UUID primary keys with gen_random_uuid(), TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY policies driven by current_setting('app.tenant_id'), and PgBouncer per-connection setup, matching the skill's stack; baseline relied on application-level tenant filtering and serial IDs.

scenarios.name: Full-text search with ranking and highlighting on articles
scenarios.rationale: Treatment created a generated tsvector column with GIN index, used @@ with plainto_tsquery, ranked via ts_rank, and added ts_headline for highlights as the skill prescribes; baseline used ILIKE or non-indexed to_tsvector and skipped ts_headline.
